title: hieracium juranum subsp. olivaceum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. olivaceum, also known as a plant species within the dandelion family, is a type of flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Hieracium juranum subsp. olivaceum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
